protocol.name: independently_reconstructed_temporal_validation
protocol.selection_metric: mean date-wise Spearman IC on validation only
protocol.selection_tie_break: first candidate in the declared order
protocol.final_fit: refit selected parameters on train plus validation
protocol.test_use: one prediction pass after selection; never used for tuning

paper_protocol_note: The paper instead states 10-fold training-set CV, but does not identify the splitter, score, seed, selected values, or provide fitting code. These declared candidates implement the requested validation-only strong baselines and are not claimed to be the author baselines.
